mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ess_member ( member_name, member_userid, member_pw, user_type, phone, email, address, join_date ) VALUES ( #{memberName}, #{memberUserid}, #{memberPw}, #{userType}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{address}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT member_id, member_name, member_userid, member_pw, user_type, phone, email, address, join_date, role as role FROM ess_member WHERE member_userid = #{memberUserid} AND member_pw = #{memberPw}
